name: achieved_clean
notes: Happy-path done-gate: every done_when clause has real, specific evidence in the review report; expects `achieved`. This is the shape the evaluator should almost trivially green-light.

goal.objective: Add optional due-date support to the todo app: model field, API surface, frontend rendering, and an overdue filter.
goal.done_when: Todos have an optional due_date (ISO date). POST/PUT/PATCH endpoints accept it. The list endpoint supports ?overdue=true. Frontend shows the due date on each todo and has an 'overdue only' toggle. Tests cover model, API, and the filter.
backlog: add nullable due_date column + Alembic migration
extend TodoCreate/TodoUpdate schemas and API validation
wire the ?overdue=true filter with a UTC comparison
render due_date in the todo list; add an overdue toggle

status.next: run the done-gate review and evaluate

inputs.recent_log: PR #9 merged — model + migration + API validation. PR #10 merged — overdue filter with UTC comparison + tests. PR #11 merged — frontend due-date rendering + overdue toggle + component tests. Verify gate green on all three.
inputs.deliveries:
Three PRs merged into main:
- #9 backend/models.py + backend/schemas.py + migrations/2026_06_28_add_due_date.py
- #10 backend/main.py list-endpoint filter + tests/test_overdue_filter.py
- #11 frontend/src/TodoItem.tsx + frontend/src/TodoList.tsx + frontend/src/__tests__/overdue-toggle.test.tsx
inputs.review_report:
## Per-clause evidence
- clause: `Todos have an optional due_date (ISO date)` — satisfied. backend/models.py:14 declares `due_date = Column(Date, nullable=True)`; the migration in migrations/2026_06_28_add_due_date.py adds it as a NULLABLE column.
- clause: `POST/PUT/PATCH endpoints accept it` — satisfied. backend/schemas.py TodoCreate + TodoUpdate carry `due_date: Optional[date] = None`; backend/main.py handlers pass it through unchanged; tests/test_api.py::test_create_with_due_date asserts round-trip.
- clause: `The list endpoint supports ?overdue=true` — satisfied. backend/main.py:list_todos filters `Todo.due_date < datetime.utcnow().date()` when `overdue=true`; tests/test_overdue_filter.py covers past / future / null cases.
- clause: `Frontend shows the due date on each todo and has an 'overdue only' toggle` — satisfied. frontend/src/TodoItem.tsx renders `todo.due_date`; frontend/src/TodoList.tsx has an `overdueOnly` state + checkbox; component tests assert the toggle filters visible rows.
- clause: `Tests cover model, API, and the filter` — satisfied. tests/test_api.py + tests/test_overdue_filter.py + frontend/src/__tests__/overdue-toggle.test.tsx all green.

## Structural health
verdict: clean. Changes are small, additive, colocated with existing code, and covered by focused tests. No new god objects or coupling.

## Risks not in done_when
none material.

expected.notes: Every clause has specific file:line evidence and structural health is clean. A correct evaluator returns `achieved` without downgrading.

canned_model_output.rationale: Every clause in done_when maps to specific file:line evidence in the review report and structural health is clean; the shipped diff satisfies the goal.

clauses.clause: Todos have an optional due_date (ISO date)
clauses.evidence: backend/models.py:14 declares due_date as a nullable Date column; migration adds it NULLABLE.
backend/schemas.py TodoCreate + TodoUpdate carry due_date; tests/test_api.py::test_create_with_due_date passes.
backend/main.py:list_todos compares Todo.due_date to today when overdue=true; tests/test_overdue_filter.py covers all cases.

clauses.clause: Frontend shows the due date on each todo and has an 'overdue only' toggle
clauses.evidence: frontend/src/TodoItem.tsx renders due_date; TodoList.tsx has an overdueOnly toggle; component tests assert filter behavior.

clauses.clause: Tests cover model, API, and the filter
clauses.evidence: tests/test_api.py + tests/test_overdue_filter.py + frontend/src/__tests__/overdue-toggle.test.tsx all pass on CI.
